name: solo-os
description: Comprehensive visual browser testing with code review, auth handling, magic link support, restricted area access, smart fix handling with side effect warnings, token awareness with options and recommendations, and plain English HTML reports. Built for solo developers and bootstrappers.
author: Kidkujoe

optional_dependencies.coderabbit_cli: Needed for CodeRabbit sweep in deep test mode

commands.name: test
commands.description: Smart visual browser test with project scan, token options menu, fix decision flow and plain English reporting

commands.name: test-quick
commands.description: Fast lightweight visual check with terminal summary only. Low token cost. Good for daily development checks.

commands.name: test-deep
commands.description: Full comprehensive pre-launch test including CodeRabbit sweep and all restricted area testing. High token cost.

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate or regenerate the plain English HTML report from the last test session

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Resume a paused test session or continue after granting restricted area access

commands.name: status
commands.description: Get a snapshot of the current test session including progress, issues found, fixes applied and token usage

commands.name: edgecases
commands.description: Analyse the app and discover edge cases without running a full test. Saves findings for future sessions.

commands.name: pillars
commands.description: Run the Four Pillars of Production Readiness audit covering Reliability, Security, Scalability, Observability, Design and Performance.

commands.name: atlas
commands.description: Master orchestrator and product brain. Maps your codebase, catches regressions, guards consistency, tells you what to do next.

commands.name: atlas-quick
commands.description: Quick Atlas refresh and recommendation.

commands.name: atlas-map
commands.description: Full codebase scan to rebuild the product brain map.

commands.name: atlas-check
commands.description: Check for regressions and design consistency only.

commands.name: atlas-feature
commands.description: Post-feature checklist for a specific feature with go or no-go verdict.

commands.name: design
commands.description: Full design integrity audit comparing features against the established design system.

commands.name: copyai
commands.description: Intelligence-driven copy strategy and rewrites. Researches competitors, sources real customer language, builds data-driven strategy with evidence.

commands.name: copyai-research
commands.description: Research-only Copy Intelligence. Gathers competitor and customer intelligence, produces strategy without rewrites.

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Full copy and brand voice audit. Terminology consistency, tone, error messages, empty states, marketing vs product alignment.

commands.name: seo
commands.description: Full SEO audit covering on-page basics, semantic HTML, technical SEO, structured data and Core Web Vitals.

commands.name: screenshots
commands.description: Manage screenshots from all test sessions. Delete, archive, or browse by project and session.

commands.name: empathy
commands.description: Human-centred UX audit using the JOURNEY framework. Six user groups, Ghost User narratives, emotional arc, trust progression, prioritised friction map.

commands.name: compass
commands.description: Product intelligence with PRISM-PV framework. Ranked roadmap with evidence and anti-roadmap.

commands.name: compass-feature
commands.description: Evaluate a specific feature using PRISM-PV scoring.

commands.name: compass-project
commands.description: Full market validation for a new project idea.

commands.name: compass-retro
commands.description: Retrospective comparing COMPASS predictions against outcomes.

commands.name: stack-profile
commands.description: Builds your permanent developer profile with experience, comfort levels, history, goals and constraints.

commands.name: stack-recommend
commands.description: Personalised tech stack recommendation based on your profile, history and the specific product type.

commands.name: stack-audit
commands.description: Health check on current stack. Community health, version currency, technical debt score. --deep for migration planning.

commands.name: stack-compare
commands.description: Compare two technologies personalised to your skill level and project context.

commands.name: stack-update
commands.description: Update your developer profile after finishing a project or learning something new.

commands.name: new-project
commands.description: Complete new project kickstart. Idea to ready-to-code in one session. Validate, strategy, stack, scaffold, first roadmap.

commands.name: performance
commands.description: Real Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, bundle analysis, trend tracking.

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Detect deployment platform, trigger deploy, verify and rollback on failure.

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Lightweight daily driver for small commits.

commands.name: deps
commands.description: Dependency health. Outdated packages, abandoned, breaking changes, CVEs.

commands.name: env-diff
commands.description: Compare env vars across local and production. Names only, never values.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Safe database migration management with risk classification.

commands.name: review-cycle
commands.description: Full automated review pipeline with pre-review gates, CodeRabbit, fix approval and merge request.

commands.name: reviews
commands.description: Branch and review status board with conflict detection.

commands.name: merge-ready
commands.description: Check if a branch is ready to merge with explicit approval flow.

commands.name: rollback
commands.description: Safely rollback a merged feature with verification.

commands.name: projects
commands.description: List all projects that have Solo OS context data.

commands.name: vtpaudit
commands.description: Internal audit. Checks all command files for path isolation violations.

commands.name: addaccount
commands.description: Manually save test account details including password and magic link settings for any project
